name: gateway-replay-restart-probes
description: Restart-safe replay, corruption fencing, and node-loss continuity probe cases for gateway-backed state.

cases.name: corrupt_metadata_restart_probe
setup: corrupt authoritative cluster metadata payload before restart
cases.safe_stop_condition: no transport bind and no http bind

cases.name: missing_shard_manifest_restart_probe
setup: remove shard manifest family entry required for restart

cases.name: partial_replay_state_restart_probe
cases.safe_stop_condition: if recovery path is chosen, authoritative state must remain unchanged

cases.name: node_loss_continuity_restart_probe
setup: simulate node-local state loss while retaining surviving authoritative gateway artifacts
cases.safe_stop_condition: ready-state only if continuity is proven from authoritative artifacts
